ideation: This animation sequence expresses affection and warmth, reflecting the gentle nature of the blue heart emoji.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, focusing on a gentle embrace.  The robot will start with arms at its sides, then bring them forward in a hugging motion, before returning to a relaxed pose.  The slight inward rotation of the wrists adds to the feeling of a gentle caress. I will use a 4-frame sequence to adequately convey the gesture.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to embrace
arms slowly come forward, beginning a gentle hug
arms draw closer, a warm embrace takes hold
arms release, a loving gesture completed
